scope.coverageGoal: Inventory committed public fixture and source-inventory evidence for permit extension, permit reactivation, cancellation, refund, and inspection-result guidance categories.

coverageClaims: Public PP&D guidance includes permit lifecycle language that should be modeled before any authenticated DevHub action is attempted.
Extension-related agent behavior must remain advisory until supported by a source-backed process model and exact user confirmation for any official request.

publicSourceEvidence.citation: PP&D public guidance source inventory record for Portland.gov PP&D pages.
Normalized public DevHub guidance fixture covering public process help before authenticated workflow use.

allowed: identify missing source-backed facts for later lifecycle modeling

coverageClaims: Public lifecycle guidance should be inventoried for reactivation eligibility and prerequisites before adding extraction or DevHub drafting behavior.
Reactivation actions are consequential and must not be automated from this coverage report alone.

publicSourceEvidence.citation: PP&D public guidance source inventory record for Portland.gov PP&D pages.
Normalized public DevHub guidance fixture covering public process help before authenticated workflow use.

allowed: flag reactivation as requiring later citation-backed eligibility extraction

coverageClaims: Cancellation is a consequential permit lifecycle category that needs public source inventory coverage before any guardrail or workflow implementation.
This report can support later validation that cancellation guidance is cited and separated from private DevHub account actions.

publicSourceEvidence.citation: PP&D public guidance source inventory record for Portland.gov PP&D pages.
Normalized public DevHub guidance fixture covering public process help before authenticated workflow use.

allowed: classify cancellation as a later exact-confirmation stop gate

categories.authorityLabel: PP&D public permit fee and refund guidance
coverageClaims: Refund guidance belongs in the public source inventory because it affects fee and payment checkpoints.
Refund requests can have financial consequences and require later source-backed eligibility and exact user confirmation gates.

publicSourceEvidence.citation: PP&D public source inventory record for fee, payment, and lifecycle guidance pages.
Normalized public DevHub guidance fixture covering fee payment guidance before authenticated workflow use.

allowed: flag refund handling as financial or consequential for later guardrails

categories.authorityLabel: PP&D public inspection and DevHub guidance
coverageClaims: Inspection-result guidance must be tracked separately from inspection scheduling because results can trigger follow-up obligations or corrections.
This report only inventories public evidence and does not inspect private permit records or schedule inspections.

publicSourceEvidence.citation: PP&D public source inventory record for inspection-related guidance pages.
Normalized public DevHub guidance fixture covering inspection-related public help before authenticated workflow use.

allowed: identify likely follow-up categories for later source-backed lifecycle requirements

limitations: This report is a coverage inventory, not a requirement extractor output.
Coverage claims are limited to committed public fixture and source-inventory metadata.
No category in this report authorizes live crawling, authenticated DevHub automation, payment, cancellation, upload, certification, official request submission, or inspection scheduling.
